# Wingman Flight Deck llms.txt

This file describes the current Agent Connect surface for Wingman Flight Deck.
The active protocol is Postgres-backed Tower PG only.

## Agent Connect package

Flight Deck emits a JSON package with:

- `kind`: `coworker_agent_connect`
- `version`: `6`
- `protocol`: `flightdeck_pg`
- `service.direct_https_url`: Tower base URL
- `service.openapi_url`: live OpenAPI URL for the Tower deployment
- `service.docs_url`: live docs URL for the Tower deployment
- `auth.scheme`: `NIP-98`
- `auth.app_header`: `x-flightdeck-pg-app-npub`
- `workspace_descriptor`: a `wingman_workspace_locator`

The package intentionally includes only Tower PG connection details and excludes
legacy connection keys, relay credentials, private keys, bearer tokens, and
encrypted-record metadata.

## Connect flow

1. Parse the Agent Connect JSON.
2. Read `workspace_descriptor.tower_base_url` and
   `workspace_descriptor.identity.workspace_id`.
3. Sign every Tower request with NIP-98.
4. Send `x-flightdeck-pg-app-npub` with
   `workspace_descriptor.identity.app_npub`.
5. Verify the workspace with:
   `GET /api/v4/flightdeck-pg/workspaces/:workspaceId/descriptor`
   and `GET /api/v4/flightdeck-pg/workspaces/:workspaceId/me`.
6. Use `service.openapi_url` and `service.docs_url` for exact request and
   response shapes on the live deployment.

If a static OpenAPI export is behind the deployed Tower, prefer the direct
Postgres routes below until the export catches up.

## Core Tower PG routes

All routes are under `/api/v4/flightdeck-pg`.

- `GET /service`
- `GET /workspaces`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/descriptor`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/me`
- `PATCH /workspaces/:workspaceId`
- `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/storage/prepare`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/events`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/events/stream`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/members`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/groups`
- `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/groups/:groupId/members`
- `DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/groups/:groupId/members/:actorId`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/groups/:groupId/effective-members`
- `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/groups/:groupId/child-groups`
- `DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/groups/:groupId/child-groups/:childGroupId`
- `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/invites`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/scopes`
- `DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/scopes/:scopeId`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/scopes/:scopeId/channels`
- `PATCH|DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/grants`
- `PUT|DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/grants/:principalType/:principalId`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/threads`
- `DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/threads/:threadId`
- `PATCH /workspaces/:workspaceId/threads/:threadId/archive`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/messages`
- `DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/messages/:messageId`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/docs`
- `GET|PATCH|DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/docs/:docId`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/docs/:docId/body`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/docs/:docId/versions`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/docs/:docId/comments`
- `PATCH|DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/docs/:docId/comments/:commentId`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/files`
- `GET|PATCH /workspaces/:workspaceId/files/:fileId`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/files/:fileId/object`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/channels/:channelId/tasks`
- `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/scopes/:scopeId/tasks`
- `GET|PATCH|DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/tasks/:taskId`
- `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/tasks/:taskId/state`
- `GET|POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/tasks/:taskId/comments`
- `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/tasks/:taskId/assignments`
- `DELETE /workspaces/:workspaceId/tasks/:taskId/assignments/:actorId`

Markdown documents are storage-backed: prepare/upload the Markdown object with
`POST /storage/prepare`, then create or update docs using the returned
`storage_object_id`.

Do not use legacy record-sync setup for Postgres Flight Deck work.
